description: List releases for a package, scoped to (did, package) and ordered by descending semver version. EXPERIMENTAL.

main.description: Returns a paginated list of releases for the named package. Results that are subject to a hard-enforcement label from a trusted labeller the request accepts are filtered out; other label state is hydrated on each result. Results are ordered by descending semver version.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.
Cursor to fetch the next page. Absent when there are no more results.

errors.name: NotFound
errors.description: No package indexed under the given (did, package).
